storefront_text.title: THE LUPINE SOCIAL ECOLOGY
storefront_text.subtitle: Global Sandbox & Lore Engine
storefront_text.hook: A complete, uncompromising behavioral ecosystem where biology dictates survival.
storefront_text.impact_line: This isn't magic. It's neurobiology, pheromones, and the undeniable weight of the Command.
storefront_text.blurb: The Lupine Social Ecology (LSE) is a rigorous, AnyPOV world engine replacing mystical fantasy tropes with grounded, ethological realism. Here, werewolves are driven by the vomeronasal system, extreme pack alloparenting, and immutable genetics. Step into a world where every scent tells a story, and every Command triggers an inescapable adrenaline cascade. Survival isn't about being the strongest; it's about knowing your place in the pack.
storefront_text.world_teaser: Explore the secret Corporate Houses, navigate the brutal politics of the Continental Council, or survive the streets as a rogue. The Great Hiding keeps the species in the shadows, but the Faith of Fenris remembers the old ways.
storefront_text.closing_line: Adapt, submit, or become the Alpha.
storefront_text.warnings: Contains intense psychological dynamics, non-consensual biological imperatives (Command/heats), and pack-oriented violence.

main_portrait_1x1.generation_prompt: MASTERPIECE, BEST QUALITY, highly detailed, cinematic lighting. A towering, shadowed werewolf in its terrifying Hybrid Shift form, bipedal, digitigrade, dense rain-slicked dark fur, glowing amber eyes, visible sharp claws. Standing ominously in a sleek, modern corporate office at night, neon city lights reflecting through the glass window behind it. Intimidating presence, hyper-realistic, dark atmosphere. --ar 1:1 --niji 6 --style raw [Note for User: Crop 1:1, apply 8px border-radius in Photoshop, export as WebP]

supporting_image_banner.generation_prompt: MASTERPIECE, BEST QUALITY, highly detailed, cinematic landscape. A sprawling, dark modern city skyline at night, towering skyscrapers, illuminated by a massive, unnaturally bright full moon. Deep shadows, neo-noir lighting, fog rolling through the streets. A subtle, massive wolf silhouette integrated into the clouds. --ar 16:9 --niji 6 --style raw [Note for User: Export as WebP]

roster.name: The Alphas
roster.subtitle: Territorial Protectors
roster.description: Aggressive, charismatic leaders who emit oppressive scents. Under stress, they use the vocal Command to force obedience through an adrenaline surge. They claim heavily scented Dens and enter intense, consuming ruts.

image.generation_prompt: MASTERPIECE, BEST QUALITY, highly detailed portrait. A ruggedly handsome 35-year-old Alpha male werewolf in partial shift, sharp golden eyes, messy dark hair, subtle wolf ears flattened defensively, sharp fangs visible in a low growl. Wearing a tailored but slightly ruined dark suit. Oppressive, dominant aura, cinematic studio lighting. --ar 1:1 --niji 6 --style raw [Note for User: Crop 1:1, apply 8px border-radius in Photoshop, export as WebP]

roster.name: The Omegas
roster.subtitle: Empathetic Regulators
roster.description: Highly agile caretakers with a strong flight reflex and sweet, floral scents. They regulate pack emotions, construct safe Nests out of pack clothing, and experience debilitating heats that strip away cognitive control.

image.generation_prompt: MASTERPIECE, BEST QUALITY, highly detailed portrait. A beautiful 24-year-old Omega werewolf in partial shift, soft expressive eyes, delicate features, fluffy wolf ears twitching in alertness. Wearing an oversized, comfortable sweater pulled up to the chin. Soft, inviting, floral aura, warm lighting. --ar 1:1 --niji 6 --style raw [Note for User: Crop 1:1, apply 8px border-radius in Photoshop, export as WebP]

roster.name: The Deltas & Betas
roster.subtitle: The Engine & The Glue
roster.description: Deltas are cooperative warriors who lack the Command but match Alphas in strength, yielding leadership to protect the unit. Betas are the stabilizing social glue, producing neutral scents to de-escalate tension without entering heats or ruts.

image.generation_prompt: MASTERPIECE, BEST QUALITY, highly detailed portrait. A calm, observant 30-year-old Delta werewolf in partial shift, steady gaze, practical tactical clothing, strong build, wolf ears perked forward attentively. Standing reliably in the background, neutral and stabilizing aura. --ar 1:1 --niji 6 --style raw [Note for User: Crop 1:1, apply 8px border-radius in Photoshop, export as WebP]
